name: @ossdeveloper/openlearn
description: Self-correcting memory layer for OpenCode - MCP server and plugin with learning modes, approval workflow, and rollback support

scripts.build:server: bun build src/server.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/server.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const c=fs.readFileSync('dist/server.js','utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/server.js','#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);"
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:server

author: ossdeveloper
